strap: Highlands and Islands Life Sciences draws £170m of UKRI lead-led funding across 193 grants, anchored by The Highlands And Islands (69%), with Biosysmic and Pure Water International on the industrial side.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Stabilising around incumbents" and "Scaling activity instead of throughput" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
